personalInfo.name: MIKITA KAVALIOU
personalInfo.title: Java & Angular Engineer • Spring Boot, TypeScript & Clean Architecture
personalInfo.professionalObjective: Software Engineer specializing in the Java ecosystem (Spring Boot, Java 21) and modern frontend frameworks (Angular, TypeScript). Expert in distributed systems design, legacy platform migration, and AI-powered solutions. Recognized for aligning engineering excellence, high availability, and compliance (RGPD, PCI-DSS) with strong business impact.
personalInfo.status: Based in Grenoble, France | VPF Visa – Free access to the French job market

experience.title: Software Engineer
responsibilities: Legacy migration to Java 21 & Spring Boot 3 : Migrated a monolithic architecture to a modular SOLID/DDD/Clean Architecture design.
Backend Development & Persistence : Implemented Spring Data JPA/Hibernate and QueryDSL for optimized data access. Applied Repository and AOP patterns for logging and security management.
Infrastructure & Performance : Optimized AWS infrastructure (Auto-scaling) handling 1,200 RPS. Tuned Spring Caching (Redis) and event-driven pipelines: 30% faster API response times for 200k+ users.

Quality & Mentoring : Led a team of 3 developers through Clean Architecture adoption. Implemented unit and integration testing with JUnit 5, Mockito, and Testcontainers (80% coverage): 35% fewer regressions, 40% faster code reviews.

experience.title: Consultant & Freelance Engineer
responsibilities: ZIRO.FIT (FinTech) : Designed a Spring Boot microservices architecture processing $500k+/mo GMV via Stripe Connect. PCI-DSS compliance. Extensive use of Spring Security and Strategy/Factory patterns for multi-tenant management. SQL optimization (LATERAL JOINs): 60% latency reduction on 2M+ records.
Lexity (AI EdTech) : Developed a secure AI platform (RGPD) with Spring Cloud Stream & Kafka for async RAG feedback processing. TTFT <200ms, 99.9% uptime.
Interly (AI Coaching) : High-performance backend using Project Loom (Virtual Threads) and Spring WebFlux managing 500+ concurrent real-time voice streams (<300ms latency).

experience.title: Software Developer
responsibilities: Developed scalable micro-services with Java / Spring Cloud for Enterprise applications (50k+ requests/day).
Implemented resilience patterns via Resilience4j (Circuit Breaker, Retry, Timeout) with Clean Architecture. Structured code reviews and CI: 25% faster reviews, <2 post-merge defects/sprint.

education.description: System programming (C, C++, Assembly), microprocessor architecture
